metadata.title: Periodic Notes
metadata.description: Create/manage your daily, weekly, and monthly notes

regex.source: p.textContent = "With this plugin, you can quickly create and navigate to daily, weekly,\n      and monthly notes. Enable them below to get started."
regex.target: p.textContent = "通过这个插件，你可以快速的创建并管理你的日、周和月笔记。\n 启用下面的选项以开始使用。"

regex.source: You have successfully migrated your daily notes settings.
regex.target: 您已成功迁移日常笔记设置。

regex.source: now disable the Daily Notes core plugin to avoid any confusion.
regex.target: 禁用 Daily Notes 核心插件以避免任何混淆。
